title: Gemini 3.6 Flash is Here, but Netizens Are Laughing Even Louder: Saved on Tokens but Lost Their Intelligence
excerpt: If you've been using Gemini since last year, the latest popular joke is: it's like watching your own brother gradually develop Alzheimer's. Normally, when a com
content_html:
If you've been using Gemini since last year, the latest popular joke is: it's like watching your own brother gradually develop Alzheimer's. Normally, when a company releases a new model, it should be used to refute such jokes. But just now, after Google unveiled three new models, instead of retracting that statement, netizens laughed even louder, giving a sense of "they didn't believe in you, yet you turned out to be the most disappointing." These three models are 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and 3.5 Flash Cyber for cybersecurity. The wording in the official blog is still familiar: more efficient, smarter, built for large-scale AI agents, without missing a beat. However, the actual experience is drastically different.

Starting with the flagship 3.6 Flash. It's a minor version upgrade of the 3.5 Flash from this May's I/O conference, and the official positioning is as a workhorse model. The biggest selling point of this generation is saving tokens: according to Artificial Analysis Index data, 3.6 Flash uses 17% fewer output tokens than 3.5 Flash, and up to 65% less in DeepSWE scenarios. When running multi-step tasks, the number of reasoning steps and tool calls is also reduced. The price has indeed dropped, at $1.5 per million input tokens and $7.5 per million output tokens, while the previous 3.5 Flash had an output price of $9. This directly cuts down to $7.5, making it faster and more cost-effective, with the cost of a single agent task significantly reduced.

In benchmark tests, code ability was a focus, with DeepSWE rising from 37% to 49%. The official claims there are fewer unnecessary code changes, shorter execution loops, and generated code closer to production requirements; the MLE Bench for machine learning research saw a more significant increase, from 49.7% to 63.9%; OSWorld-Verified for computer operations rose from 78.4% to 83%, and computer operations have become a built-in tool in the Gemini API and enterprise edition, ready to use right out of the box. A minor but practical update is that the knowledge cutoff date has finally been pushed from January 2025 to March 2026, finally moving on from the old calendar. In terms of security, the official said that 3.6 Flash has an upgraded Frontier Safety protection, focusing on two types of abuse: chemical, biological, radiological, nuclear, and cyber attacks, with stronger resistance to jailbreaking, while trying not to harm normal needs and minimizing unnecessary rejections.

The next tier down is 3.5 Flash-Lite, which focuses on speed and affordability, targeting high-throughput and low-latency tasks, such as agent search and document processing. It's the fastest in the 3.5 series, capable of generating 350 tokens per second according to Artificial Analysis measurements. The price is extremely cheap, at $0.3 for input and $2.5 for output per million tokens, with quality significantly better than the 3.1 Flash-Lite released in March. It supports adjusting the reasoning level, where lower-end tasks can run at the lowest level for speed and efficiency, and when facing complex sub-tasks requiring multiple steps, it can adjust the thinking level upward. Computer operations have also been made into a built-in tool.

Significant improvements: Terminal-Bench2.1 for code and agent tasks jumped from 31% to 54%, GDM-MRCR v2 for long context improved from 60.1% to 72.2%, and GDPval-AA v2 for real-task execution increased from 642 to 1140. Most interestingly, this lower-tier model actually surpassed its higher-level counterpart 3Flash in many agent and code tasks, such as SWE-Bench Pro (54.2% vs. 49.6%) and OSWorld-Verified (74.0% vs. 65.1%), meaning that tasks once handled by 3Flash now have a faster and stronger alternative. The official provided several use cases, including extracting product features from massive e-commerce data, acting as a sidekick for 3.6 Flash to generate 25 web design concepts at once, batch translating and summarizing receipts, and playing and iterating to create games. Ashler, Palo Alto Networks, and Ramp customers also praised its speed, intelligence, and cost-effectiveness.

The last one, 3.5 Flash Cyber, takes a different approach, specifically designed for finding and fixing security vulnerabilities in code. Google's logic is clever: AI's speed in finding vulnerabilities has already surpassed existing systems' speed in fixing them, leading to more vulnerabilities piling up. Instead, they're using the affordable and efficient Flash to batch fix them. This model was fine-tuned from the 3.5 Flash and paired with their own CodeMender tool, where multiple Flash Cyber agents work together and then summarize into a report. On the industry-known CyberGym benchmark, it reached first-tier levels and used fewer tokens compared to larger models. However, this model is currently unavailable, considering vulnerability-finding is a double-edged sword. Google has followed in Anthropic's footsteps by adopting a security narrative, locking it tightly and only offering limited access to trusted partners for internal testing. The goal is to give frontline defenders time to fix vulnerabilities before they are exploited, while preventing people from misusing it.

At this point, you might wonder, where is the true flagship, 3.5Pro? According to the official explanation, it's still being tested with partners and will be launched once ready. However, the story behind this statement may not be as smooth. According to reports from Bloomberg and others, the code generation capability of 3.5Pro has never met internal expectations. Google updated its training data again in late June to make up for the code shortcomings, but the results still didn't improve. There are even rumors that Google completely discarded the original training plan and started over. Meanwhile, Google AI spokesperson Logan Kilpatrick openly skipped 3.5Pro in public statements, shifting the focus to Gemini4, claiming the largest and most ambitious Gemini4 pre-training has already started, with progress exciting. Given the backdrop of the flagship delay, this feels somewhat like a distraction or a promise to prolong the illusion.

Looking at the Flash models released today alone, netizens don't fully buy into them. Third-party evaluation agency Artificial Analysis stated that the two new models indeed cut the time per task in half and improved token efficiency, with the intelligent index of Flash-Lite increasing by 11 points. However, the intelligence level of 3.6 Flash compared to 3.5 Flash remained basically unchanged. The price hasn't dropped enough to ignore the capability gap, nor has the capability risen enough to justify the cost. On X platform, some users criticized that 3.6 Flash scored exactly the same as 3.5 Flash on Artificial Analysis, and it's worse than competitors like Meta Spark1.1, GLM-5.2, 5.6Luna, Sonnet5, Grok4.5, 5.6Terra, calling it simply terrible.

User Angel approached from the perspective of value for money, pointing out that the usage cost of 3.6 Flash is higher than GPT-5.6Sol medium, but its intelligence level is lower, creating an awkward combination. After all, the foundation of the Flash series is value for money, but now it's pointed out that its value is worse than competitors, equivalent to self-sabotage. As a comparison, OpenAI's Tibo has also recently spoken up, stating that due to the weekly active user reaching 10 million, the paid users of Codex and ChatGPT Work have received a new round of quota reset. This contrast and disparity, do people still remember Google Gemini3 by the lake?

Real-world testers also added fuel to the fire. User Balder directly criticized, saying the performance of these three models is worse than the previous 3.5 Flash, with problems including but not limited to basic decoding errors, strange Chinese word choices, poor image and video quality, mismatch with instructions, severe limitations, frequent memory confusion, and incorrect tool calls. He even raised a conspiracy theory, suggesting that Google did this to free up computing power for sale to Anthropic, sarcastically saying this is what Pichai wants - Cloud First. X user Conor Dart ran an AI-generated game test using Google's own Antigravity, resulting in worse wood textures and marble that looked almost similar but still couldn't be used. He directly called it another failure, saying he would rather wait for Gemini3.5 or 3.6Pro.

On one side, the official accounts highlight more efficiency, cheaper prices, and fewer tokens. On the other side, most netizens gave negative feedback, along with a series of bad news behind the models, such as the flagship delay, top talents leaving, and shrinking market value. It's hard not to wonder if Google really messed up its technology path, focusing too much on cost-saving and forgetting about improving intelligence, only relying on a few Flash models to stabilize the situation. Regardless, the pre-training of Gemini4 has already started. If this attempt also fails, the joke about Alzheimer's could truly become a prophecy.

sentences.zh: 如果你从去年就开始使用Gemini，最新流行的笑话是：就像看着自己的兄弟逐渐患上老年痴呆症一样。

sentences.en: Normally, when a company releases a new model, it should be used to refute such jokes.
sentences.zh: 通常，当一家公司发布新车型时，应该用来反驳这样的笑话。

sentences.en: But just now, after Google unveiled three new models, instead of retracting that statement, netizens laughed even louder, giving a sense of "they didn't believe in you, yet you turned out to be the most disappointing."
sentences.zh: 但就在刚刚，谷歌推出三款新机型后，网友不但没有收回这一说法，反而笑得更大声，给人一种“他们不相信你，结果你却是最失望的”之感。

sentences.en: These three models are 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and 3.5 Flash Cyber for cybersecurity.
sentences.zh: 这三个型号分别是 3.6 Flash、3.5 Flash-Lite 和用于网络安全的 3.5 Flash Cyber​​。

sentences.en: The wording in the official blog is still familiar: more efficient, smarter, built for large-scale AI agents, without missing a beat.
sentences.zh: 官方博客中的措辞仍然是熟悉的：更高效、更智能、为大规模AI代理而构建，不遗余力。

sentences.en: However, the actual experience is drastically different.
sentences.zh: 然而，实际体验却截然不同。

sentences.en: Starting with the flagship 3.6 Flash.
sentences.zh: 从旗舰级 3.6 Flash 开始。

sentences.en: It's a minor version upgrade of the 3.5 Flash from this May's I/O conference, and the official positioning is as a workhorse model.
sentences.zh: 它是今年5月I/O大会上3.5 Flash的小版本升级，官方定位为主力机型。

sentences.en: The biggest selling point of this generation is saving tokens: according to Artificial Analysis Index data, 3.6 Flash uses 17% fewer output tokens than 3.5 Flash, and up to 65% less in DeepSWE scenarios.
sentences.zh: 这一代最大的卖点是节省代币：根据人工分析指数数据，3.6 Flash 比 3.5 Flash 使用的输出代币减少了 17%，在 DeepSWE 场景下最多可减少 65%。

sentences.en: When running multi-step tasks, the number of reasoning steps and tool calls is also reduced.
sentences.zh: 运行多步骤任务时，推理步骤和工具调用的数量也会减少。

sentences.en: The price has indeed dropped, at $1.5 per million input tokens and $7.5 per million output tokens, while the previous 3.5 Flash had an output price of $9.
sentences.zh: 价格确实下降了，每百万输入代币为 1.5 美元，每百万输出代币为 7.5 美元，而之前的 3.5 Flash 的输出价格为 9 美元。

sentences.en: This directly cuts down to $7.5, making it faster and more cost-effective, with the cost of a single agent task significantly reduced.
sentences.zh: 这直接降低到了 7.5 美元，速度更快、成本更低，单个代理任务的成本大幅降低。

sentences.zh: 在基准测试中，代码能力是重点，DeepSWE 从 37% 上升到 49%。

sentences.en: The official claims there are fewer unnecessary code changes, shorter execution loops, and generated code closer to production requirements; the MLE Bench for machine learning research saw a more significant increase, from 49.7% to 63.9%; OSWorld-Verified for computer operations rose from 78.4% to 83%, and computer operations have become a built-in tool in the Gemini API and enterprise edition, ready to use right out of the box.
sentences.zh: 官方声称不必要的代码改动更少，执行循环更短，生成的代码更接近生产需求；机器学习研究的 MLE Bench 增长更为显着，从 49.7% 增加到 63.9%；计算机操作的 OSWorld-Verified 从 78.4% 上升到 83%，计算机操作已成为 Gemini API 和企业版中的内置工具，开箱即用。

sentences.en: A minor but practical update is that the knowledge cutoff date has finally been pushed from January 2025 to March 2026, finally moving on from the old calendar.
sentences.zh: 一个小但实用的更新是，知识截止日期终于从 2025 年 1 月推迟到 2026 年 3 月，终于从旧日历中移开。

sentences.en: In terms of security, the official said that 3.6 Flash has an upgraded Frontier Safety protection, focusing on two types of abuse: chemical, biological, radiological, nuclear, and cyber attacks, with stronger resistance to jailbreaking, while trying not to harm normal needs and minimizing unnecessary rejections.
sentences.zh: 安全方面，官方表示，3.6 Flash升级了Frontier Safety防护，重点针对化学、生物、放射性、核和网络攻击两种类型的滥用，对越狱的抵抗力更强，同时尽量不损害正常需求，最大限度减少不必要的拒绝。

sentences.en: The next tier down is 3.5 Flash-Lite, which focuses on speed and affordability, targeting high-throughput and low-latency tasks, such as agent search and document processing.
sentences.zh: 下一层是 3.5 Flash-Lite，它专注于速度和经济性，针对高吞吐量和低延迟任务，例如代理搜索和文档处理。

sentences.en: It's the fastest in the 3.5 series, capable of generating 350 tokens per second according to Artificial Analysis measurements.
sentences.zh: 它是 3.5 系列中速度最快的，根据人工分析测量，每秒能够生成 350 个令牌。

sentences.en: The price is extremely cheap, at $0.3 for input and $2.5 for output per million tokens, with quality significantly better than the 3.1 Flash-Lite released in March.
sentences.zh: 价格极其便宜，每百万代币输入 0.3 美元，输出 2.5 美元，质量明显优于 3 月份发布的 3.1 Flash-Lite。

sentences.en: It supports adjusting the reasoning level, where lower-end tasks can run at the lowest level for speed and efficiency, and when facing complex sub-tasks requiring multiple steps, it can adjust the thinking level upward.
sentences.zh: 它支持调整推理级别，低端任务可以在最低级别运行以提高速度和效率，而当面临需要多个步骤的复杂子任务时，可以向上调整思维级别。

sentences.en: Computer operations have also been made into a built-in tool.
sentences.zh: 计算机操作也被做成了内置工具。

sentences.zh: 重大改进：用于代码和代理任务的 Terminal-Bench2.1 从 31% 跃升至 54%，用于长上下文的 GDM-MRCR v2 从 60.1% 提高到 72.2%，用于实际任务执行的 GDPval-AA v2 从 642 增加到 1140。

sentences.en: Most interestingly, this lower-tier model actually surpassed its higher-level counterpart 3Flash in many agent and code tasks, such as SWE-Bench Pro (54.2% vs. 49.6%) and OSWorld-Verified (74.0% vs. 65.1%), meaning that tasks once handled by 3Flash now have a faster and stronger alternative.
sentences.zh: 最有趣的是，这个较低层的模型实际上在许多代理和代码任务中超越了其较高级别的对应模型 3Flash，例如 SWE-Bench Pro（54.2% vs. 49.6%）和 OSWorld-Verified（74.0% vs. 65.1%），这意味着曾经由 3Flash 处理的任务现在有了更快、更强的替代方案。

sentences.en: The official provided several use cases, including extracting product features from massive e-commerce data, acting as a sidekick for 3.6 Flash to generate 25 web design concepts at once, batch translating and summarizing receipts, and playing and iterating to create games.
sentences.zh: 官方提供了多个用例，包括从海量电商数据中提取产品特征、充当3.6 Flash的助手一次生成25个网页设计概念、批量翻译和汇总收据、玩迭代创建游戏等。

sentences.en: Ashler, Palo Alto Networks, and Ramp customers also praised its speed, intelligence, and cost-effectiveness.
sentences.zh: Ashler、Palo Alto Networks 和 Ramp 客户也称赞其速度、智能和成本效益。

This model was fine-tuned from the 3.5 Flash and paired with their own CodeMender tool, where multiple Flash Cyber agents work together and then summarize into a report. On the industry-known CyberGym benchmark, it reached first-tier levels and used fewer tokens compared to larger models. However, this model is currently unavailable, considering vulnerability-finding is a double-edged sword. Google has followed in Anthropic's footsteps by adopting a security narrative, locking it tightly and only offering limited access to trusted partners for internal testing. The goal is to give frontline defenders time to fix vulnerabilities before they are exploited, while preventing people from misusing it.

sentences.en: The last one, 3.5 Flash Cyber, takes a different approach, specifically designed for finding and fixing security vulnerabilities in code.
sentences.zh: 最后一个，3.5 Flash Cyber​​，采用了不同的方法，专门用于查找和修复代码中的安全漏洞。

sentences.en: Google's logic is clever: AI's speed in finding vulnerabilities has already surpassed existing systems' speed in fixing them, leading to more vulnerabilities piling up.
sentences.zh: 谷歌的逻辑很聪明：人工智能发现漏洞的速度已经超过了现有系统修复漏洞的速度，导致更多的漏洞堆积起来。

sentences.en: Instead, they're using the affordable and efficient Flash to batch fix them.
sentences.zh: 相反，他们使用经济实惠且高效的 Flash 来批量修复这些问题。

sentences.en: This model was fine-tuned from the 3.5 Flash and paired with their own CodeMender tool, where multiple Flash Cyber agents work together and then summarize into a report.
sentences.zh: 该模型是在 Flash 3.5 基础上进行微调的，并与他们自己的 CodeMender 工具配对，其中多个 Flash Cyber​​ 代理协同工作，然后汇总成报告。

sentences.en: On the industry-known CyberGym benchmark, it reached first-tier levels and used fewer tokens compared to larger models.
sentences.zh: 在业界知名的 Cyber​​Gym 基准测试中，与较大的模型相比，它达到了一级水平并且使用了更少的代币。

sentences.en: However, this model is currently unavailable, considering vulnerability-finding is a double-edged sword.
sentences.zh: 然而，考虑到漏洞发现是一把双刃剑，这种模型目前还不可用。

sentences.en: Google has followed in Anthropic's footsteps by adopting a security narrative, locking it tightly and only offering limited access to trusted partners for internal testing.
sentences.zh: 谷歌追随了 Anthropic 的脚步，采用了安全叙述，将其紧紧锁定，并且仅向可信赖的合作伙伴提供有限的访问权限以进行内部测试。

sentences.en: The goal is to give frontline defenders time to fix vulnerabilities before they are exploited, while preventing people from misusing it.
sentences.zh: 目标是让一线防御者有时间在漏洞被利用之前修复漏洞，同时防止人们滥用它。

blocks.html_en: At this point, you might wonder, where is the true flagship, 3.5Pro? According to the official explanation, it's still being tested with partners and will be launched once ready. However, the story behind this statement may not be as smooth. According to reports from Bloomberg and others, the code generation capability of 3.5Pro has never met internal expectations. Google updated its training data again in late June to make up for the code shortcomings, but the results still didn't improve. There are even rumors that Google completely discarded the original training plan and started over. Meanwhile, Google AI spokesperson Logan Kilpatrick openly skipped 3.5Pro in public statements, shifting the focus to Gemini4, claiming the largest and most ambitious Gemini4 pre-training has already started, with progress exciting. Given the backdrop of the flagship delay, this feels somewhat like a distraction or a promise to prolong the illusion.

sentences.en: At this point, you might wonder, where is the true flagship, 3.5Pro?
sentences.zh: 说到这里，你可能会想，真正的旗舰3.5Pro在哪里？

sentences.en: According to the official explanation, it's still being tested with partners and will be launched once ready.
sentences.zh: 据官方解释，目前还在与合作伙伴进行测试，一旦准备就绪就会上线。

sentences.en: However, the story behind this statement may not be as smooth.
sentences.zh: 然而，这句话背后的故事或许并不那么顺利。

sentences.en: According to reports from Bloomberg and others, the code generation capability of 3.5Pro has never met internal expectations.
sentences.zh: 据彭博社等报道，3.5Pro的代码生成能力从未达到内部预期。

sentences.en: Google updated its training data again in late June to make up for the code shortcomings, but the results still didn't improve.
sentences.zh: 谷歌在6月下旬再次更新了训练数据，以弥补代码缺陷，但结果仍然没有改善。

sentences.en: There are even rumors that Google completely discarded the original training plan and started over.
sentences.zh: 甚至有传言称，谷歌完全放弃了原来的培训计划，重新开始。

sentences.en: Meanwhile, Google AI spokesperson Logan Kilpatrick openly skipped 3.5Pro in public statements, shifting the focus to Gemini4, claiming the largest and most ambitious Gemini4 pre-training has already started, with progress exciting.
sentences.zh: 与此同时，谷歌AI发言人Logan Kilpatrick在公开声明中公然跳过3.5Pro，将重点转移到Gemini4，声称规模最大、最雄心勃勃的Gemini4预训练已经开始，进展令人兴奋。

sentences.en: Given the backdrop of the flagship delay, this feels somewhat like a distraction or a promise to prolong the illusion.
sentences.zh: 考虑到旗舰产品延迟的背景，这感觉有点像分散注意力或承诺延长幻想。

blocks.html_en: Looking at the Flash models released today alone, netizens don't fully buy into them. Third-party evaluation agency Artificial Analysis stated that the two new models indeed cut the time per task in half and improved token efficiency, with the intelligent index of Flash-Lite increasing by 11 points. However, the intelligence level of 3.6 Flash compared to 3.5 Flash remained basically unchanged. The price hasn't dropped enough to ignore the capability gap, nor has the capability risen enough to justify the cost. On X platform, some users criticized that 3.6 Flash scored exactly the same as 3.5 Flash on Artificial Analysis, and it's worse than competitors like Meta Spark1.1, GLM-5.2, 5.6Luna, Sonnet5, Grok4.5, 5.6Terra, calling it simply terrible.

sentences.en: Looking at the Flash models released today alone, netizens don't fully buy into them.
sentences.zh: 仅看今天发布的Flash模型，网友们并不完全买账。

sentences.en: Third-party evaluation agency Artificial Analysis stated that the two new models indeed cut the time per task in half and improved token efficiency, with the intelligent index of Flash-Lite increasing by 11 points.
sentences.zh: 第三方评测机构Artificial Analysis表示，两款新模型确实将每个任务的时间缩短了一半，提高了代币效率，Flash-Lite的智能指数提升了11点。

sentences.en: However, the intelligence level of 3.6 Flash compared to 3.5 Flash remained basically unchanged.
sentences.zh: 不过3.6 Flash相比3.5 Flash的智能水平基本没有变化。

sentences.en: The price hasn't dropped enough to ignore the capability gap, nor has the capability risen enough to justify the cost.
sentences.zh: 价格还没有下降到足以忽略能力差距，能力也没有上升到足以证明成本合理。

sentences.en: On X platform, some users criticized that 3.6 Flash scored exactly the same as 3.5 Flash on Artificial Analysis, and it's worse than competitors like Meta Spark1.1, GLM-5.2, 5.6Luna, Sonnet5, Grok4.5, 5.6Terra, calling it simply terrible.
sentences.zh: 在X平台上，有用户批评3.6 Flash在人工分析上的得分与3.5 Flash完全相同，而且比Meta Spark1.1、GLM-5.2、5.6Luna、Sonnet5、Grok4.5、5.6Terra等竞争对手还差，称其简直糟糕。

blocks.html_en: User Angel approached from the perspective of value for money, pointing out that the usage cost of 3.6 Flash is higher than GPT-5.6Sol medium, but its intelligence level is lower, creating an awkward combination. After all, the foundation of the Flash series is value for money, but now it's pointed out that its value is worse than competitors, equivalent to self-sabotage. As a comparison, OpenAI's Tibo has also recently spoken up, stating that due to the weekly active user reaching 10 million, the paid users of Codex and ChatGPT Work have received a new round of quota reset. This contrast and disparity, do people still remember Google Gemini3 by the lake?

sentences.en: User Angel approached from the perspective of value for money, pointing out that the usage cost of 3.6 Flash is higher than GPT-5.6Sol medium, but its intelligence level is lower, creating an awkward combination.
sentences.zh: 用户Angel从性价比的角度上前，指出3.6 Flash的使用成本高于GPT-5.6Sol中等，但其智能水平较低，形成一个尴尬的组合。

sentences.en: After all, the foundation of the Flash series is value for money, but now it's pointed out that its value is worse than competitors, equivalent to self-sabotage.
sentences.zh: 毕竟Flash系列的根基就是物有所值，现在却被指出其价值比竞争对手差，相当于自毁前程。

sentences.en: As a comparison, OpenAI's Tibo has also recently spoken up, stating that due to the weekly active user reaching 10 million, the paid users of Codex and ChatGPT Work have received a new round of quota reset.
sentences.zh: 作为对比，OpenAI 的 Tibo 最近也发声，表示由于每周活跃用户达到 1000 万，Codex 和 ChatGPT Work 的付费用户获得了新一轮的配额重置。

sentences.en: This contrast and disparity, do people still remember Google Gemini3 by the lake?
sentences.zh: 这种反差和悬殊，人们还记得湖边的Google Gemini3吗？

blocks.html_en: Real-world testers also added fuel to the fire. User Balder directly criticized, saying the performance of these three models is worse than the previous 3.5 Flash, with problems including but not limited to basic decoding errors, strange Chinese word choices, poor image and video quality, mismatch with instructions, severe limitations, frequent memory confusion, and incorrect tool calls. He even raised a conspiracy theory, suggesting that Google did this to free up computing power for sale to Anthropic, sarcastically saying this is what Pichai wants - Cloud First. X user Conor Dart ran an AI-generated game test using Google's own Antigravity, resulting in worse wood textures and marble that looked almost similar but still couldn't be used. He directly called it another failure, saying he would rather wait for Gemini3.5 or 3.6Pro.

sentences.en: Real-world testers also added fuel to the fire.
sentences.zh: 现实世界的测试人员也火上浇油。

sentences.en: User Balder directly criticized, saying the performance of these three models is worse than the previous 3.5 Flash, with problems including but not limited to basic decoding errors, strange Chinese word choices, poor image and video quality, mismatch with instructions, severe limitations, frequent memory confusion, and incorrect tool calls.
sentences.zh: 用户Balder直接批评称，这三款机型的性能比之前的3.5 Flash还要差，存在的问题包括但不限于基本解码错误、中文单词选择奇怪、图像和视频质量差、与指令不匹配、限制严重、内存混乱频繁、工具调用不正确等。

sentences.en: He even raised a conspiracy theory, suggesting that Google did this to free up computing power for sale to Anthropic, sarcastically saying this is what Pichai wants - Cloud First.
sentences.zh: 他甚至提出了阴谋论，暗示谷歌这样做是为了释放算力出售给Anthropic，讽刺称这就是皮查伊想要的——云优先。

sentences.en: X user Conor Dart ran an AI-generated game test using Google's own Antigravity, resulting in worse wood textures and marble that looked almost similar but still couldn't be used.
sentences.zh: X 用户 Conor Dart 使用 Google 自己的反重力运行了 AI 生成的游戏测试，结果导致木材纹理更差，大理石看起来几乎相似，但仍然无法使用。

sentences.en: He directly called it another failure, saying he would rather wait for Gemini3.5 or 3.6Pro.
sentences.zh: 他直接称之为又一次失败，表示宁愿等待Gemini3.5或3.6Pro。

blocks.html_en: On one side, the official accounts highlight more efficiency, cheaper prices, and fewer tokens. On the other side, most netizens gave negative feedback, along with a series of bad news behind the models, such as the flagship delay, top talents leaving, and shrinking market value. It's hard not to wonder if Google really messed up its technology path, focusing too much on cost-saving and forgetting about improving intelligence, only relying on a few Flash models to stabilize the situation. Regardless, the pre-training of Gemini4 has already started. If this attempt also fails, the joke about Alzheimer's could truly become a prophecy.

sentences.en: On one side, the official accounts highlight more efficiency, cheaper prices, and fewer tokens.
sentences.zh: 一方面，官方账号强调更高的效率、更便宜的价格和更少的代币。

sentences.en: On the other side, most netizens gave negative feedback, along with a series of bad news behind the models, such as the flagship delay, top talents leaving, and shrinking market value.
sentences.zh: 另一方面，大部分网友给出了负面反馈，随之而来的是旗舰延期、顶尖人才离开、市值缩水等一系列负面消息。

sentences.en: It's hard not to wonder if Google really messed up its technology path, focusing too much on cost-saving and forgetting about improving intelligence, only relying on a few Flash models to stabilize the situation.
sentences.zh: 很难不让人怀疑谷歌是否真的把自己的技术路线搞砸了，过于注重节省成本而忘记了提高智能，只依靠几个Flash模型来稳定局面。

sentences.en: Regardless, the pre-training of Gemini4 has already started.
sentences.zh: 不管怎样，Gemini4的预训练已经开始了。

sentences.en: If this attempt also fails, the joke about Alzheimer's could truly become a prophecy.
sentences.zh: 如果这次尝试也失败了，那么关于阿尔茨海默氏症的笑话可能真的会成为一个预言。

content_html_zh:
如果你从去年就开始使用Gemini，最新流行的笑话是：就像看着自己的兄弟逐渐患上老年痴呆症一样。 通常，当一家公司发布新车型时，应该用来反驳这样的笑话。 但就在刚刚，谷歌推出三款新机型后，网友不但没有收回这一说法，反而笑得更大声，给人一种“他们不相信你，结果你却是最失望的”之感。 这三个型号分别是 3.6 Flash、3.5 Flash-Lite 和用于网络安全的 3.5 Flash Cyber​​。 官方博客中的措辞仍然是熟悉的：更高效、更智能、为大规模AI代理而构建，不遗余力。 然而，实际体验却截然不同。

从旗舰级 3.6 Flash 开始。 它是今年5月I/O大会上3.5 Flash的小版本升级，官方定位为主力机型。 这一代最大的卖点是节省代币：根据人工分析指数数据，3.6 Flash 比 3.5 Flash 使用的输出代币减少了 17%，在 DeepSWE 场景下最多可减少 65%。 运行多步骤任务时，推理步骤和工具调用的数量也会减少。 价格确实下降了，每百万输入代币为 1.5 美元，每百万输出代币为 7.5 美元，而之前的 3.5 Flash 的输出价格为 9 美元。 这直接降低到了 7.5 美元，速度更快、成本更低，单个代理任务的成本大幅降低。

在基准测试中，代码能力是重点，DeepSWE 从 37% 上升到 49%。 官方声称不必要的代码改动更少，执行循环更短，生成的代码更接近生产需求；机器学习研究的 MLE Bench 增长更为显着，从 49.7% 增加到 63.9%；计算机操作的 OSWorld-Verified 从 78.4% 上升到 83%，计算机操作已成为 Gemini API 和企业版中的内置工具，开箱即用。 一个小但实用的更新是，知识截止日期终于从 2025 年 1 月推迟到 2026 年 3 月，终于从旧日历中移开。 安全方面，官方表示，3.6 Flash升级了Frontier Safety防护，重点针对化学、生物、放射性、核和网络攻击两种类型的滥用，对越狱的抵抗力更强，同时尽量不损害正常需求，最大限度减少不必要的拒绝。

下一层是 3.5 Flash-Lite，它专注于速度和经济性，针对高吞吐量和低延迟任务，例如代理搜索和文档处理。 它是 3.5 系列中速度最快的，根据人工分析测量，每秒能够生成 350 个令牌。 价格极其便宜，每百万代币输入 0.3 美元，输出 2.5 美元，质量明显优于 3 月份发布的 3.1 Flash-Lite。 它支持调整推理级别，低端任务可以在最低级别运行以提高速度和效率，而当面临需要多个步骤的复杂子任务时，可以向上调整思维级别。 计算机操作也被做成了内置工具。

重大改进：用于代码和代理任务的 Terminal-Bench2.1 从 31% 跃升至 54%，用于长上下文的 GDM-MRCR v2 从 60.1% 提高到 72.2%，用于实际任务执行的 GDPval-AA v2 从 642 增加到 1140。 最有趣的是，这个较低层的模型实际上在许多代理和代码任务中超越了其较高级别的对应模型 3Flash，例如 SWE-Bench Pro（54.2% vs. 49.6%）和 OSWorld-Verified（74.0% vs. 65.1%），这意味着曾经由 3Flash 处理的任务现在有了更快、更强的替代方案。 官方提供了多个用例，包括从海量电商数据中提取产品特征、充当3.6 Flash的助手一次生成25个网页设计概念、批量翻译和汇总收据、玩迭代创建游戏等。 Ashler、Palo Alto Networks 和 Ramp 客户也称赞其速度、智能和成本效益。

最后一个，3.5 Flash Cyber​​，采用了不同的方法，专门用于查找和修复代码中的安全漏洞。 谷歌的逻辑很聪明：人工智能发现漏洞的速度已经超过了现有系统修复漏洞的速度，导致更多的漏洞堆积起来。 相反，他们使用经济实惠且高效的 Flash 来批量修复这些问题。 该模型是在 Flash 3.5 基础上进行微调的，并与他们自己的 CodeMender 工具配对，其中多个 Flash Cyber​​ 代理协同工作，然后汇总成报告。 在业界知名的 Cyber​​Gym 基准测试中，与较大的模型相比，它达到了一级水平并且使用了更少的代币。 然而，考虑到漏洞发现是一把双刃剑，这种模型目前还不可用。 谷歌追随了 Anthropic 的脚步，采用了安全叙述，将其紧紧锁定，并且仅向可信赖的合作伙伴提供有限的访问权限以进行内部测试。 目标是让一线防御者有时间在漏洞被利用之前修复漏洞，同时防止人们滥用它。

说到这里，你可能会想，真正的旗舰3.5Pro在哪里？ 据官方解释，目前还在与合作伙伴进行测试，一旦准备就绪就会上线。 然而，这句话背后的故事或许并不那么顺利。 据彭博社等报道，3.5Pro的代码生成能力从未达到内部预期。 谷歌在6月下旬再次更新了训练数据，以弥补代码缺陷，但结果仍然没有改善。 甚至有传言称，谷歌完全放弃了原来的培训计划，重新开始。 与此同时，谷歌AI发言人Logan Kilpatrick在公开声明中公然跳过3.5Pro，将重点转移到Gemini4，声称规模最大、最雄心勃勃的Gemini4预训练已经开始，进展令人兴奋。 考虑到旗舰产品延迟的背景，这感觉有点像分散注意力或承诺延长幻想。

仅看今天发布的Flash模型，网友们并不完全买账。 第三方评测机构Artificial Analysis表示，两款新模型确实将每个任务的时间缩短了一半，提高了代币效率，Flash-Lite的智能指数提升了11点。 不过3.6 Flash相比3.5 Flash的智能水平基本没有变化。 价格还没有下降到足以忽略能力差距，能力也没有上升到足以证明成本合理。 在X平台上，有用户批评3.6 Flash在人工分析上的得分与3.5 Flash完全相同，而且比Meta Spark1.1、GLM-5.2、5.6Luna、Sonnet5、Grok4.5、5.6Terra等竞争对手还差，称其简直糟糕。

用户Angel从性价比的角度上前，指出3.6 Flash的使用成本高于GPT-5.6Sol中等，但其智能水平较低，形成一个尴尬的组合。 毕竟Flash系列的根基就是物有所值，现在却被指出其价值比竞争对手差，相当于自毁前程。 作为对比，OpenAI 的 Tibo 最近也发声，表示由于每周活跃用户达到 1000 万，Codex 和 ChatGPT Work 的付费用户获得了新一轮的配额重置。 这种反差和悬殊，人们还记得湖边的Google Gemini3吗？

现实世界的测试人员也火上浇油。 用户Balder直接批评称，这三款机型的性能比之前的3.5 Flash还要差，存在的问题包括但不限于基本解码错误、中文单词选择奇怪、图像和视频质量差、与指令不匹配、限制严重、内存混乱频繁、工具调用不正确等。 他甚至提出了阴谋论，暗示谷歌这样做是为了释放算力出售给Anthropic，讽刺称这就是皮查伊想要的——云优先。 X 用户 Conor Dart 使用 Google 自己的反重力运行了 AI 生成的游戏测试，结果导致木材纹理更差，大理石看起来几乎相似，但仍然无法使用。 他直接称之为又一次失败，表示宁愿等待Gemini3.5或3.6Pro。

一方面，官方账号强调更高的效率、更便宜的价格和更少的代币。 另一方面，大部分网友给出了负面反馈，随之而来的是旗舰延期、顶尖人才离开、市值缩水等一系列负面消息。 很难不让人怀疑谷歌是否真的把自己的技术路线搞砸了，过于注重节省成本而忘记了提高智能，只依靠几个Flash模型来稳定局面。 不管怎样，Gemini4的预训练已经开始了。 如果这次尝试也失败了，那么关于阿尔茨海默氏症的笑话可能真的会成为一个预言。
